mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_WORKSPACE (ownerNo, workSpaceName, description, type, createdDt, updatedDt) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{request.workSpaceName}, #{request.description}, #{request.type}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_WORKSPACE SET deletedDt = NOW(), updatedDt = NOW() WHERE workSpaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND ownerNo = #{ownerNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT SW.workSpaceNo AS workSpaceNo, SW.ownerNo AS ownerNo, SM.nickname AS ownerNickname, SW.workSpaceName AS workSpaceName, SW.description AS description, SW.type AS type, SW.createdDt AS createdDt, SW.updatedDt AS updatedDt FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE SW JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SW.ownerNo WHERE SW.workSpaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND SW.deletedDt IS NULL

SELECT SW.workSpaceNo AS workSpaceNo, SW.ownerNo AS ownerNo, SM.nickname AS ownerNickname, SW.workSpaceName AS workSpaceName, SW.description AS description, SW.type AS type, SW.createdDt AS createdDt, SW.updatedDt AS updatedDt FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE SW JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SW.ownerNo JOIN SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER SWM ON SWM.workSpaceNo = SW.workSpaceNo WHERE SWM.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND SW.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY SW.createdDt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER (workSpaceNo, memberNo, role, joinedDt, updatedDt) VALUES (#{workSpaceNo}, #{memberNo}, #{role}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT SWM.wsMemberNo AS wsMemberNo, SWM.workSpaceNo AS workSpaceNo, SWM.memberNo AS memberNo, SM.nickname AS nickname, SL.email AS email, SWM.role AS role, SWM.joinedDt AS joinedDt FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER SWM LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SWM.memberNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_LOGIN SL ON SL.memberNo = SWM.memberNo WHERE SWM.workSpaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND SWM.deletedDt IS NULL ORDER BY SWM.joinedDt ASC

SELECT SWM.wsMemberNo AS wsMemberNo, SWM.workSpaceNo AS workSpaceNo, SWM.memberNo AS memberNo, SM.nickname AS nickname, SL.email AS email, SWM.role AS role, SWM.joinedDt AS joinedDt FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER SWM LEFT JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SWM.memberNo LEFT JOIN SAAS_LOGIN SL ON SL.memberNo = SWM.memberNo WHERE SWM.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND SWM.workSpaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND SWM.deletedDt IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_WORKSPACE_INVITE (workSpaceNo, inviterNo, inviteToken, role, expiredDt, usedCount, createdDt) VALUES (#{workSpaceNo}, #{inviterNo}, #{inviteToken}, #{role}, #{expiredDt}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT SWI.inviteNo, SWI.workSpaceNo, SWI.inviteToken, SWI.role, DATE_FORMAT(SWI.expiredDt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expiredDt, SWI.usedCount, SM.nickname AS inviterNickName FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE_INVITE SWI JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SWI.inviterNo = SM.memberNo WHERE SWI.inviteToken = #{inviteToken}
